macro_samples: def draw_angle(expr A, O, B, n) =
draw (0,u)         {right}    .. tension 2 .. ( u*dir -150 ){dir 120}  .. tension 2 .. ( u*dir -30  ){dir -120} .. tension 2 .. cycle
draw (0,u)         {right}    .. tension 4 .. ( u*dir -150 ){dir 120}  .. tension 4 .. ( u*dir -30  ){dir -120} .. tension 4 .. cycle
xpart A = ypart A = ypart B = xpart C = 0
xpart B = ypart C = xpart D = ypart D = 2cm
fill fullcircle scaled u shifted (u*dir30) withcolor .8white
addto pic contour fullcircle scaled 1cm withcolor .8white
draw subpath(0,.4) of q withpen pencircle scaled 1bp
def compute_curve(suffix f)(expr xmin, xmax, xinc) =
for x=xmin+xinc step xinc until xmax:
pair A, B, C, D, E
draw for i=0 step 1 until 3: 1cm*right rotated (i*90) -- endfor cycle
draw for i=0 step 1 until n-1:
draw for i=0 step 1 until n-1:
for i=0 step length(p)/n until length(p):
draw for i=0 step 10 until 360: 2cm* (sind(2*i), cosd(3*i)) .. endfor cycle
draw 2cm* (sind(2*i), cosd(3*i)) withpen pencircle scaled 2bp withcolor
draw point (arctime (1/2 arclength(p)) of p) of p withpen pencircle scaled 4bp
numeric xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, M
numeric xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, M
numeric xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax, M
point i of p {direction i of p} ..
point i of p {direction i of p} ..
vardef pave(expr t, A, B, C, n) =
save a, i, n, G, X
draw (-2u,4u) for i=-1.9 step .1 until 2.01: .. (i*u, i*i*u) endfor withpen pencircle scaled 1bp
